name: Nelnet
confidenceReason: Trading near or below adjusted Book Value. Retains ~68% of earnings for aggressive reinvestment.
bullCase: A successful transformation from a melting ice cube (legacy federal student loans) into a diversified tech and services conglomerate. Dominant in education tech and loan servicing (NDS) and highly adept at incubating hidden ventures. It operates as a deep value 'baby Berkshire.'
bearCase: Highly complex, sum-of-the-parts business model makes it prone to being misunderstood and ignored by the market. Sensitivity to interest rates and regulatory changes in student loan financing.
description: Nelnet, Inc. engages in loan servicing, education technology services, and payment businesses worldwide.
